title: lobelia erinus f. bicolor
intro: Lobelia erinus f. bicolor, also known as the blue lobelia or lobelia, is a flowering plant species within the campanulaceae family, characterized by its vibrant blue and white bicolor blooms. Historically, lobelia has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily as a respiratory aid, and is known to have expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of lobelia include its ability to reduce stress, alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma, and serve as a natural treatment for colds and flu. Lobelia is often prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be cautious due to potential toxicity at high doses.
